seo.title: New and Used Brewery Equipment For Sale | Beverage Equipment Traders
seo.description: San Marcos, CA brewery and beverage equipment dealer. New and used brewhouses, fermenters, canning lines, kegs, and more. Rigging, consignment, and auction services. Shipping nationwide.

hero.imageAlt: Brewery equipment at Beverage Equipment Traders
hero.heading:
New and Used Brewery
Equipment For Sale.
hero.body: Operating from a 40,000 sq ft consolidation facility in San Marcos, California. Every asset is photographed and listed with full condition documentation. Nationwide rigging, freight, and installation on every transaction.

items.name: 15 BBL Brewhouse with HLT
items.imageAlt: 15 BBL Brewhouse with HLT — Used BREWHOUSE

why.imageAlt: BET brewhouse facility — San Marcos, CA
why.heading: Built by Operators,
paragraphs: Beverage Equipment Traders was founded by former brewery owners who spent fifteen years on the production floor. We know the difference a half percent of efficiency makes on your line — and we know what failure on install day costs.

Before we brokered a single tank, we ran our own brewhouse — troubleshooting glycol loops at 2 a.m., welding back together packaging lines that vendors said were dead. Every piece in our yard has been pressure-tested by people who've actually used it in production.

images.alt: Brewery tanks loaded on flatbed truck for transport
Forklift rigging a fermenter during installation

national.heading:
Your buyer in Chicago is as real as
the one in San Diego.
national.body: BET ships to all 50 states. The majority of high-intent equipment searches carry no geographic modifier. Our content, pricing, and logistics infrastructure serve the national buyer as directly as the local one.

finalCta.heading: Get a verified quote in 24 hours.
finalCta.body:
Operator inspection, rigging, and freight quoted in a single thread.
Our trade desk responds within one business day.
